Guys were excellent at the house and cleaned up the site well after.  A pleasure to deal with from start to finish.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Elizabeth Ogunboye","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqvEiBxL35k6053gNLwmjGxCqoZkqpJGf1gjmT7NCKPY129g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I rarely write reviews, but I’ve come to appreciate how helpful they are when deciding whether to work with a company. While I can’t speak to the quality of this builder’s work, I can share my experience with their communication—or lack thereof.
I contacted Ken in mid-to-late summer to assess my roof and explore options. He visited, explained the materials and tiered packages, and offered a goodwill gesture: if I signed a contract, he’d patch any urgent issues until full repairs began. I asked about price changes and was told the quoted price would be locked in once the contract was signed.
As a cautious consumer, I took time to research and returned in late September/early October, leaving a voicemail. No response. I followed up with an email—again, no reply. After a few days, I called and finally reached him. I mentioned my previous attempts and said I was ready to proceed but had a few questions. I also reminded him that I wanted everything clearly outlined in the contract, as discussed during his visit.
Ken then said the quote was only valid for this year, which contradicted his earlier statement. He cited market conditions as the reason. I was still willing to move forward but needed clarification and contract updates. He said he’d review my email and respond. That was the last I heard from him.
I won’t be following up again.
Bottom line: Ask the right questions, get everything in writing, and be cautious. Is he nice, sure but coming from Toronto, I’ve noticed some businesses here aren’t serious and unfortunately, based on my experience this seems to be one of them.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"eva ewelina","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ80AWDSZIyRHHYiT75PH_6eLFHr_boSUw3cjRVCDNzSZi4dw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These guys are legit. I contacted Quality Care roofing after trying to deal with another top rated company on google (who were not on the ball at all). Quality Care came out and immediately knew what was wrong, and brought up some other issues that they observed as well. They were very knowledgeable and reassuring and what seemed like a giant problem to me, they were able to complete the work quickly and  Charged very reasonably for their time.
Will definitely call on them in the future if needed.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bernadette Butler-Tournadre","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIyvI-2zILhJsvEhydwCtP8lXvJmHwpyOslL7poKXDx5Q_A4g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My husband and I were very happy with the service we received from Ken and his team at Quality Care Roofing.  Ken took the time to answer all of our questions and always got back to us promptly.  The crew was efficient and made sure to do a very careful job cleaning up after the roof was installed.  We would recommend Quality Care Roofing without hesitation.","Images":null,"When":""}]

Thanks so much guys!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kelly McGregor","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUQ5TkTC5dUb_4YLoNIbVZlmB5jR7ne7gyBfNA7M89dwH3emAE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had my TPO single ply roofing system  replaced by The Roofman Inc. and couldn’t be happier with the experience. Their detailed estimate included removing the old TPO roof and the old original tar roof down to the wood decking, adding new insulation, installing a complete new TPO roof, and replacing the snow guards.

Looks like Irvine and co  short cut and did not install any metal flasher on a little ledge. Thus water was getting through. The v channel portion of roof was never done correctly. Please BEWARE of contracting this company.  They do not back your workmanship and short cut on their work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"noreen auy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLyA7MpyrHDLPFn28zd3DhyZ6_FmoNEMZA-2A5kcwAJc2UOdw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Made numerous phone call... left text...left messages... and emailed.  All efforts were ignored.  Have a water leak and they were the ones who installed it. My neighbour had issues after the roof was done and I just recently found out they had similar experience trying to reach Irvine to get it resolved.  Very disappointed as  I had referred 5 homes for them. Hope they don't run into issues with theirs and need it repaired.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"dave foster","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLY2-2YJEDB9UbZlqCPbTasqylEa-IpIKmvw5fw_qaqIek2xQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"KC Irving replaced the roof, siding, soffit and eaves of my mother-in-laws home.
After the 1st heavy rain water came in at the chimney down the bedroom wall.
They resealed around the flashing within 2 weeks.
Comment about the water down the wall and on wallpaper.."that's is not  that bad"...after more than a dozen texts and phone calls here we are.Nothing addressed.
While installeling siding they recommended painting garage door, 2 man doors and front living room window...They had a painter.
2 man doors and garage peeled off within 12 weeks.
AGAIN.. "I will stop by"...after dozens of follow-up...Crickets
I used the "roofman"...paid a little more and got great service and product.
I would never, never recommend this company...reach out and ask...I am in the phone book.
The new company name has chosen not to address the issue
"Quality Care Roofing Inc."","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Robert Webb","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIO_CHXZu4KZYdqYyg2-_mY9qNkQ-0WS0SbH0AygH1atKexAnU=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had KC install our siding and it was very professional throughout the entire process. Definitely would use again in the future and recommending to family and friends! Great service + pricing, strongly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lei Gong","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUUu0GuHXsh80YR8yfotCc5fAC8x3K-QODC4DlabKk5_xf3WEM=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just got our new roof from Ding Sheng Roofing. The team is professional, friendly, flexible, and above all, extremely efficient. We picked a color. 5 days later, we had new roof installed, rain gutters repaired, and debris removed.
We are very happy with the result.
Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jay Jay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWc_D2V01i9IsjtQn7g9VWZqwy3538U3oQIqvZVbgY7rG7HdY12iw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a leak in the basement during the Halloween week of 2024, during a rain storm. It was coming from around a pipe, so I called my plumber. My plumber determined it was a sleeve around the vent pipe that was leaking from the roof.

I had saved Ding Sheng's number when I saw their lawn sign down the street.

Cassie answered right away and fit me in for Halloween afternoon. They came by as promised and fixed the leak and did a roof inspection at the same time.

Cassie went up on the roof and took photos of before and after the work was done. She sent them to me as well, for reference.

The price was very reasonable for the work done, including a full roof inspection.

I was shocked (in a good way)! to have Cassie answer my call quickly. I was even more shocked when they came by as promised, fixed the leak, took photos and recommended I replace the shingles next year.

Cassie and her team run an honest and sincere roofing business, with reasonable prices, which is hard to find.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sindhu Sridharan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxdMrWRrCoTfHjtvCWwTy6OezW5wJ8kowXlZhPtb6ET7TATBEW=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They are very professional, efficient and hardworking company. Finished our roofing job the same day. Cassie is amazing at responding to calls, providing info and quickly actioning on everything we discussed. I recommend this company to everyone.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Robert Mustard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJCrpDtcAiknce4px0XBwQYM0QkppOrqaThJ_kdg8VWsneezA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rock Solid Masonry Repair was at our house for 2 days recently, with a crew of 4 masons, plus the owner Chris Schaefer. We have a 150 year old brick farmhouse, which was repointed about 30 years ago. Since then, the driveway foundation has settled a bit, leading to large cracks in the garage brick wall. These cracks and the entrance to the garage were expertly restored and the bricks around the entire house repointed. Chris’s crew arrived on time and completed the job in two days, as agreed. One of his masons also pointed out a likely problem with our roof, which I am having checked out. My family. have lived in this house for almost 34 years. My wife and I look to remain here for another 20-25 years. We do not anticipate any further brick work will be required. Tools were stored neatly at the end of the first day and the job site left clean. Chris is an excellent communicator and easy to work with. At the end of the job, Chris did a walk around with me, to ensure the work was done to our satisfaction. [{"Name":"Jessica Won","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW8K3ZpUC9sN44Kj9RCNgKHzhboz_4f35MjDGjPk9GujV6sHq--=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the pleasure of working with Kanada Home Improvement on a big renovation of my condo in Kitchener, and I cannot recommend them highly enough.

The project began at the end of November 2025 and was completed by the end of December 2025 — on schedule, exactly as promised. They managed three major renovations simultaneously: a built-in bench for my front entryway, a complete bathroom renovation, and a full kitchen renovation. Coordinating multiple spaces at once could have easily become overwhelming, but their organization, communication, and execution were exceptional from start to finish.

Benny (Owner and Project Manager), Chelsea (Interior Designer), and the entire contractor team were outstanding to work with at every stage of the process. From the initial planning and design discussions through construction and final finishes, they were professional, knowledgeable, transparent, and genuinely collaborative. I always felt that they were looking out for my best interest and the integrity of the project.

What stood out most was their attention to detail and their ability to translate my vision into reality. They listened carefully, offered thoughtful guidance when needed, and executed everything with craftsmanship and precision. The entryway bench is both beautiful and functional, the bathroom feels elevated and refined, and the kitchen transformation exceeded my expectations in both design and quality.

Renovations can often be stressful, but this team made the process smooth and reassuring. Their timelines were clear, communication was consistent, and their work ethic was evident throughout. They are not only talented and highly skilled professionals, but also genuinely good people to work with.

If you are looking for a renovation team that is organized, creative, detail-oriented, and committed to delivering exactly what they promise, I would strongly recommend Kanada Home Improvement.

Thank you to Benny, Chelsea, and the entire team for creating a home that truly reflects my vision.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhC3lIkXk_hvKn1lYLjDmXsk&fid=0x0:0x3c2dadc7ed73f29c"],"When":"2026-2-21"},{"Name":"Lin Lam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUjJP-mxpgcpFPntQyhw09GQvArApq0W3yBJsHFZEW1iUgRWyc=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had a kitchen renovation to our 23 year old kitchen.  We contacted 4 general contractors, one was a no show, one was outrageously expensive, Kanada Home Improvement and the other was close.  Before we made our decision, Benny the project manager made at least 4 visits to our home, bringing with him on different occasions an engineer associate and the kitchen interior designer to put our minds at ease by giving us a better vision of what our future kitchen would look like, no obligations. We finally went with Benny as his estimate was by far the most fair and reasonable for our wish list. I can’t say enough good things about Benny, his crew and his team of tradesmen all of whom conducted themselves professionally.  We appreciated the most was the heavy lifting from Benny’s crew as I do not think my husband and I could handle it by ourselves. Benny was there on day one offering his suggestion, advice and ensuring everything is according to plan.

We had our chosen tiles laid in the kitchen however the tiles were of inferior quality and Benny being the “perfectionist” instructed his crew to remove the tiles and laid new tiles at no extra cost to us.

Highlight points:

- his crew and tradesmen cleaned up the area each and every time after they are done with their part even our drive way. I had duct cleaning done after the kitchen renovations and the duct cleaning person even complimented that the general contractor did a good job as he has seen worse.
- The renovations took about 3.5 weeks instead of 6 weeks by other companies.
- Benny is a very patient individual. We had changed our minds on design, oven hood,  and island size several times and yet he was polite and professional about it.
- He would always respond to my texts inquiry even during weekends and after office hours and kept us informed of the renovations plan.
- Trustworthy individual.

It’s hard to find good contractors and we are glad and happy that we chose Kanada Home Improvement, a company one can trust and depend on.

Thank you to Benny and his team, we love our new kitchen!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIC38-iBCg&fid=0x0:0x3c2dadc7ed73f29c"],"When":"2024-11-9"},{"Name":"Darshan Makwana","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIvpw3Fc99MRhcUPnG3ZzyPkeMA8joz83hEThG6zrG76pDAQJQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"It was a pleasure of working with Kannada Home Improvements for the construction, renovation, and kitchen development of Chatako Foods, and we couldn't be more satisfied with the results. From start to finish, the team showcased exceptional professionalism, accuracy, and precision in their work, ensuring that every detail was executed flawlessly.

Outstanding Project Management by Benny:

A special mention to Project Manager Benny, whose expertise and hands-on approach made a significant difference in the entire process. Benny took the time to understand our vision, needs, and business requirements, translating them into a highly functional and aesthetically pleasing space. His meticulous attention to detail, prompt communication, and problem-solving skills ensured that every stage of the project was completed smoothly and efficiently.

Precision and Quality Workmanship:

One of the most impressive aspects of Kannada Home Improvements was their commitment to accuracy and quality craftsmanship. Whether it was the  flooring, tiling, plumbing, or electrical installations, everything was done with precision and adherence to industry standards. They didn’t just meet our expectations—they exceeded them! The finishing touches, such as custom cabinetry and the overall kitchen layout, were done with immense care and precision, ensuring a seamless workflow for our restaurant operations.

Hassle-Free Experience and Transparent Communication:

From the initial consultation to the final touches, the team maintained clear and transparent communication. They provided accurate cost estimates and insightful recommendations whenever needed. If any adjustments were required, Benny and his team were always ready to discuss solutions, ensuring that our vision was not compromised.

Final Outcome: A Stunning, Well-Designed Kitchen & Renovated Space:

The final result speaks for itself! The kitchen is not only visually appealing but also highly functional and optimized for our restaurant’s daily operations. The quality of materials used and the overall layout reflect the expertise and dedication of Kannada Home Renovations. Thanks to them, Chatako Foods now has a well-designed, efficient, and inviting space that enhances both productivity and customer experience.

Highly Recommended!

If you're looking for a trustworthy, skilled, and highly professional construction and renovation company, Kannada Home Improvements is the way to go. And if you’re lucky enough to have Benny as your project manager, you can be assured that your project is in the best hands!

Thank you to Kannada Home Improvements and Benny for delivering such an outstanding service. We highly recommend them to anyone in need of accurate, precise, and high-quality renovation work.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDQo--ksAE&fid=0x0:0x3c2dadc7ed73f29c"],"When":"2025-3-13"},{"Name":"Nick S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVCkSqrnoyNhM2Pcvr90B3WQZ23AGIK-VkcnyW3DeERlwEjelg6jw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Bennie was amazing the deal with, very responsive and went the extra mile to finish our basement apartment project on schedule and budget. [{"Name":"Susan Kieswetter","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKBeOAUsONbNspMRiMaqNTS6dPhJWP43QlfTy_Q5oGDrKJ9uw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had our roof replaced by LP Platinum this week and my husband and I couldn't be happier with the entire experience, from the initial visit to inspect the roof to the clean up of the crew after they completed the job. Adam, the owner, came promptly to inspect our roof after having a leak. He explained the problem and never pushed us to replace the whole roof. After answering all our questions we decided on a full roof replacement. Adam gave us a very fair quote, presented colour options and brought samples by the next day. [{"Name":"Trudy Fraser","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXyElZWoO8REQZ-L4rmH4D52T0xzIaFqI5IlbvD1LNoAQuEEeER=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We did research for months on what roofing system we wanted to purchase for our 100+ year old stone house. After meeting with 5 companies on our short list we chose Waterloo Metal Roofing. We were impressed by David and his incredible knowledge (he is an engineer) and his product. A metal roof is a BIG investment. As we watched the excellent crew work for days we got a really good understanding of why. Not a nail to be found - they screwed those panels in for hours (over the barrier). The team custom cut piece after piece around all the edges and peaks (remember OLD house - nothing is perfectly level or square anymore). Instead of a regular shingle roof that can go up in a day - it tool 3 LONG days for them to complete. Anytime we asked a question (and we asked quite a few) the crew was happy to explain to us what they were doing and why. It looks wonderful. We are so happy with the Espresso colour. It fits well in the neighbourhood and you can't tell from a distance that it is metal (like some of the barn-type or curvy metal roofs do). We still have the faded eaves , fascia and soffit as they are still holding up and the team worked around them no problem.  Overall the cost was comparable (or less) than some other metal quotes and we felt that David listened and gave us great advice on options - we even did the out-building to match. We highly recommend this company, this roofing system, David and his crew.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICcg5q4Ag&fid=0x0:0x6ffce0a8322dcb7e"],"When":"2020-3-26"},{"Name":"Meredith Perez","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJbaSh3LuYwALwnMeAD9JwUBlJwy_CuN6kpAbI8wj3_Vr2RSg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Waterloo Metal Roofing did a fantastic job on our new steel roof. We are extremely happy! David and his crew were great to work with. Seeing my wife carrying in groceries they offered to help. While waiting for the rest of their team one morning and seeing me shoveling the driveway, they grabbed shovels and helped. Everything they did was the right way... they spent time thinking about how things would look and didn't cut corners. Don't expect their quote to be the least expensive (personally, I always worry about the least expensive quote), but based on my experience I couldn't imagine a better customer experience. [{"Name":"Glen Maxwell","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVHVaUmp8fb65rRe8bJUJ4bsrzQZvAjS0bWyzFjxFxtsL8mxts=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We live in Doon valley area of Kitchener, and after a few shingles blew off during one of those classic windy spring storms, we knew it was time to deal with our aging roof. A neighbour recommended this local roofing company, and I’m really glad we gave them a call.
From the first conversation, they felt genuine and down-to-earth — no sales pitch, just honest advice about what we actually needed. They walked us through the options, explained the costs clearly, and were patient with all my questions. As a homeowner, that meant a lot.
The crew showed up early, worked hard all day, and were incredibly respectful of our property. They even took extra time to make sure no nails were left behind in the driveway (which I appreciated with kids running around). By the end of the day, the new roof looked amazing, and the yard was cleaner than when they arrived.
It’s such a relief knowing our home is protected, especially with Kitchener winters the way they are (thaw/freeze). You can tell this is a company that cares about its reputation in the community. I wouldn’t hesitate to recommend them to friends and neighbours.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAkF6VUJHbzDyNa0VbQiJyg&fid=0x0:0xfa766bbc16283ada"],"When":"2026-2-21"},{"Name":"Darren Savage","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJUOmv0SHrFSUotfD-4IX2F0lPkY0X3rJRsWukl0dq5WhPaig=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had my roof replaced by Rydel Roofing in Waterloo, and I couldn’t be happier with the experience from start to finish.

My sales associate, Beryl, was fantastic. He took the time to walk me through the options, answered all my questions, and made sure I was comfortable with the process. His knowledge and straightforward approach gave me a lot of confidence in my decision.

The crew showed up on time, worked efficiently, and clearly took pride in their workmanship. They not only did a great job on the roof itself but also left my property spotless once the job was done — you’d never know they had been there except for the new roof overhead.

From the first meeting with Beryl to the final clean-up, everything was handled with professionalism and care. I’m very pleased with the results and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend Rydel Roofing to anyone looking for a reliable and trustworthy roofing company.

Thanks again,

Darren Savage","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBzGd-4wA7M01eMGjr-ywqo&fid=0x0:0xfa766bbc16283ada"],"When":"2025-9-15"},{"Name":"Rachell Tiggelman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKkcaHDIBInbFYUNcUzNAzEBNCp3m4VsPBZtLkTV-t6X-tmSQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had Rydel Roofing quote us for our roof. They visited us and went over everything we could expect. We decided to use them. A date was set - with not much wait. The morning of, the team showed up nice and early. We had received a phone call Pryor so we knew when to expect them and what our part was to be done. The team got to work right away. It was a long day for the team but they worked hard right to the end. Our home had a lot of refuse around it and the team cleaned everything up. They did not leave a single bit of mess. We had email after it was done, showing us the roof and the new vents that had been added.  We felt extremely satisfied with the work that was done. The roof looks great and we are thrilled with it. We would totally recommend Rydel Roofing to anyone. Thanks for a great experience.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDnaIl6gecmfmxWsGuUpsjQ&fid=0x0:0xfa766bbc16283ada"],"When":"2025-9-9"},{"Name":"Arthur Rocha","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU18619HKKgxBO9Ry2883Tip7zIiTZsM6U3Yt84OrP5RuDuKmGF=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had my roof replaced with Rydel Roofing and it was a really smooth experience. The sales rep was super patient and explained everything in detail with examples, answered all my questions, and kept me in the loop. Even when they had to reschedule, he got the crew here literally the next day. Appreciate that a lot 👍 Highly recommend them for anyone in the Kitchener-Waterloo area.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAilluwqUzIUHD_r5upziIL&fid=0x0:0xfa766bbc16283ada"],"When":"2025-9-25"},{"Name":"Jeff Bain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXWHEAqazoAf2teQPB1Qruh83wX_eUJvN3jtss1JAMeK5e5MtM=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We first contacted Rydel after seeing lawn signs in our neighbourhood, including on a friend's house. Our friends were happy with Rydel and recommended them. Our rep from Rydel visited the house for measurements, brought samples on a few occasions, explained the qualities of different shingle types and brands and explained the warranty. The quote was very fair; comparable to two other companies and much, much less than the quote from two other companies (despite being generally similar materials). We signed the contract in the fall and they did the job in the spring. It took one full day for the team of 4 guys to get it done, including thorough cleanup of debris and nails. We are super happy with the neat and tidy look of the shingles. We had no regret in choosing Rydel!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA82Fl6e4iem_IWTmAsbNBn&fid=0x0:0xfa766bbc16283ada"],"When":"2025-11-27"},{"Name":"Jay Vyas","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLjA0j7w3kkTd3okdKEmnVp9lXXEdIkCGparv3u0ZSXaX3c=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Like many others this winter, we found "a couple of issues" with our roof due to ice damming. We started looking around for quotes and getting the roof done, and we had someone knock on our door giving us a flyer for rydel roofing. Now, as much as I hate soliciting, I believe it was harmless since there was no pressure and we were given an additional contact to get quotes for our roof.

That's when Beryl came into the picture, and I have to say, his professionalism, knowledge, and follow ups really gave us a sense of comfort. Like many others, we're not knowledgable in roofs, and we need to lean on other professionals to guide us, which Beryl was able to do. He kept us informed throughout the process, gave us a lot of information, and although sometimes it might seems like a sales pitch, you have the final decision, so I encourage you to learn, understand, and make your final decision once you're more informed. He even broke down our ice damming issue into multiple sub projects and told us how we should go about approaching it. He inspected our attic and looked at the ventilation, noticed gaps and inefficiencies but also found things we didn't need that others were telling us to get.

Like someone else mentioned, I found the idea of same day pitch/discount to be a little tacky, i would have preferred a bit more flexibility, like a week to think on it, but I'm also glad we had them last since we were able to get a quote that was acceptable.

The entire job lasted a day; they got both our and our neighbours house done within the day with expert workmanship. They hold themselves to high regard and follow up with a report + pictures, which we were extremely happy with. Full roof with singles, ice and water shield, good valley flashings, better vent and replaced 1-2 rotted plywood with mold.

TL;DR: Great experience and trust in Beryl guiding us through getting our roof done and making us more knowledgable and aware. Definitely ask for Beryl, you don't have to confirm the job, but you'll be glad u had him on your side. 10/10. Hope to book them again in 20+ years :)","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMDoqqj_6QE&fid=0x0:0xfa766bbc16283ada"],"When":"2025-4-23"},{"Name":"Anurag Sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUV7liuR-2DwWyFq-6y-X6LO0Cby5bzJTyz3Vti0rV4wwc8uQZGKQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We’ve had an excellent experience working with Rydel Roofing as a vendor partner in the Kitchener-Waterloo region. Their team is knowledgeable, reliable, and consistently professional from start to finish.
What stands out most is their clear communication, honest assessments, and attention to detail—especially important when working with homeowners who need confidence and transparency. They show up on time, stand by their work, and deliver quality results, which makes them a vendor we’re comfortable recommending to our clients.
If you’re looking for a roofing company you can trust in Kitchener-Waterloo, Rydel Roofing is a solid choice. I ask for them to come back and do better work but was told this situation was not covered under the 5 year warranty. I was told to clean the snow load off the roof but its 30 ft up - I'm 70 and with cancer so I can't do the impossible. They said sorry and that was the end of it. I'll never bother with them again. I contacted Desbro roofing and they understood the problem and will do it right.

I did not say it was improperly installed – it was substandard for what was required. I expected a professional assessment of what would be necessary considering the lack of accessibility to clear winter accumulation on a roof 30ft high and the damage to the original eaves-trough that showed extra reinforcement was necessary to secure the trough. None of that was made – instead, a repeat of the original standard installation was made resulting in a total failure of the work done. My experience with the project left me with the impression of how poor Amgroup acted in providing the professional service to a need requiring proper consideration for the job at hand. Fast forward 5.5 weeks after our initial meeting: instead of an installation, someone else shows up at our door to tell us we need a city permit. At this point, we were expecting our door to be installed any day.

title: All Star Roofing and Reno LTE
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Harshad Sonaje","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXgYhPknkRK5sSwSmr8SBuuixOBa2hof2N1DhwZ4JXK1fyIH-9C-g=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Roofing job is a big decision for any home owner and our roof was at its end of life and we contacted multiple roofers in the area. Lenier from All-Star Roofing and Reno LTE visited our site fully prepared with the quote/estimate.

We got quotes from 3 different roofers and Lenier gave a us the most competitive no-nonsense quote with GAF Timberline HDZ shingles including 30 years parts and labor warranty (didn't try to upsell anything or try to hurry us into making any quick decision). What more we could have asked for?

We went ahead with Lenier and team, as the job involved coordinating with two homeowners and the whole process was very smooth. When we got the quote it was estimated that it will take 2 days to complete the project as it involved a building with two semis and each side of the house having respective detached garage/storage shade needing roof replacement as well.

The weather was not cooperating as it was already November and we found 1 day which was ideal to get the job done and not 2. Lenier came with extra resources sharp at 8:30 AM in the morning and the team worked non-stop until evening and got the whole project completed including cleanup in a single day(remarkable).

They started the job, professionally followed all the processes and didn't cut any corners. I was not only impressed but very grateful as it saved our roof (our neighbors side had already developed a leak) and had we delayed any further it would have become a much bigger job and expensive.

I will highly recommend All-Star Roofing and Reno LTE as they did a great job on our roofs in record time (Impressive) and the entire building looks very cool with new roof consistent on all the building structures.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhA68LlVsH3-0x6FHgssv0dF&fid=0x0:0x28f1c53109e1e8c0"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Mia Froster","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJptqqBJDluxIG8YyArj_xzdMazI_TQoySieiaIsa-T_wR65Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"All Star Roofing and Reno LT provided an outstanding Roofing Service from start to finish. From the beginning David was super friendly and professional. He walked us through all our options without any pressure. We asked for a quote from 5 or 6 different companies; David was the only one who came  to take measurements and talk with us in person. All of the other companies gave us a quote through phone/email based on google measurements. Nothing wrong with that but personally, we liked David's approach much better. Coincidence or not, David was able to gave us a better price and some advice based on our roof conditions.

When the crew showed up, they were right on time and ready to roll. It was amazing how quickly and efficiently they worked, all while keeping everything tidy. No stray nails or debris left behind.

We are so happy with their work and would highly recommend them for any roofing needs!

Thank you so much David and all the crew.
Antonio and Nicole","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICr5omlBQ&fid=0x0:0x898f0ae2984ecaf6"],"When":"2024-7-6"},{"Name":"dean riley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ3_4UrWI3L3iajcwUxOSYutfTuAk45mcc6KpPe1lds63DdpA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We were very happy with this company. Before starting the job, they took the time to go over all the different options with me in detail, helping me understand the best choices for my home and budget. It really showed how much they care about doing the job right and making sure their customers are well-informed.

They showed up on time, worked quickly, and left everything clean and tidy. The new gutters look fantastic and have already made a noticeable difference.

If you’re looking for quality work and honest, hardworking people, I highly recommend Stera Exteriors. They took the time to explain the process, answered all my questions, and ensured everything was done to the highest standard.  The quality of their workmanship is outstanding— my home looks fantastic, and the new materials are both durable and visually appealing.  I highly recommend Stera to anyone needing exterior home improvements. Thank you for an amazing job!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sal S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLK48tW7W1jWdYO9WAQDmxgeRrp8sZRffkoR4AmGa9gsorjOw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I hired Stera initially for gutter guards as a previous “handyman” who didn’t know what he was doing had left the job incomplete. The quote was competitive and after several questions, a process through which Gibson was very patient, I decided to award the job to them. We had at least three instances where they came to work but weather was not conducive for installation yet they were patient. When they eventually started the job, they informed me of their concerns with the fascia and soffit job the previous handyman had done and let me decide whether I would like to have them redo that piece but they were very neutral and not pushy yet they listed their concerns. The additional charges were reasonable and I gave them the go ahead and they finished the job to my satisfaction. I also had them instal heating cables on the roof which was also done well. For me, the quality of the job, the patience and the professionalism was unlike what I have seen in other contractors. I highly recommend them and would use them again for similar projects. Thanks Gibson and the Stera team!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Diane Hennebry","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLiIVlFbVkUXZl5jWNI64gy2qLrDnhTpIPXWUHuPbPiSaKaow=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Just like to take a minute to thank the guys from Stera Exteriors, Gibson, Diego and Braden for the excellent work they did on March 6, 2025 on repairing the damage to our house. A week before an ice build up on our roof managed to take out most of the soffit, facia and eavestrough on the right side of our house. Unsure about what to do and the threat of the fallen eavestrough taking out the hydro wires to the house, we called Stera. They showed up within 2 hours and cut down the eavestrough and provided us with a quote for the repairs. True to their word they showed up in nasty weather to do the repairs. The quote was accurate and they stayed true to the quote. They worked non stop in below freezing temperatures and in strong winds and still managed to do a superb job. Thanks again, Diane and Ted Hennebry, St. Clements.  👍Highly recommend these Guys👍","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQl6S_5AE&fid=0x0:0xb51f823a5db98628"],"When":"2025-3-7"},{"Name":"Bashar Sukni","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIHzX8b_5sWue6pQF5npRk5Xs_o9O1qwDYcbq00x1qeFscAWu4=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I heard about them through a friend, and I’m really glad I did. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""}]
